headline: RIGHT-SIZED, NEVER REDUCED
subheading: Build a proportionate, inspection-ready quality system that scales with your pharma pipeline.
flux_prompt: An abstract editorial composition evoking a proportionate, scalable pharmaceutical quality system, rendered in deep navy with luminous teal and cyan. A clean modular framework of interlocking translucent glass tiles and concentric rings grows outward in measured steps from a small precise core, suggesting a lean system expanding only as needed. Slender connecting lines and a single delicate flow path weave between the modules like a controlled process map, with one node glowing in a fresh subtle green accent to signal an active, inspection-ready control point. Smooth gradients, soft volumetric light and generous negative space convey clinical precision, scientific rigour and premium calm; shallow depth of field melts the navy background into refined bokeh. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
